ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline Approaching
ham.body:
Hello Team,

This is a friendly reminder that the semester project submission deadline is on Friday, April 19th at 11:59 PM. Please make sure to upload your final report and presentation slides to the course portal before the deadline to avoid any late penalties.

If you have any questions or need assistance with the submission process, feel free to reach out to me or the TA.

Thank you for your hard work!

Best regards,
Dr. Laura Kim
Professor of Computer Science
University of Somewhere
